## Checks

Before requesting review, confirm these pass locally:

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] I've read [CLAUDE.md §Invariants](../blob/master/CLAUDE.md#invariants-that-must-not-be-broken) and this PR does not break any.
